title: The Fractured Ward
description: A protective ward has been shattered. Repair the ancient rune sequence before the kingdom falls.

Rune Chamber.description: An ancient stone vault etched with faint blue lines.

Forbidden Library.description: Towering shelves containing thousands of decaying spell records.

Axiomatic Ward.description: The chamber holding the fractured central ward logic core.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: The ward that protected Ashenvale has been shattered.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: Ancient runes flicker and die across the kingdom's defenses.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: You are the last Rune Hacker. The ward must be restored.

objectives.description: Repair the Fractured Ward by completing the rune breach challenge
Find the hidden rune shard in the Forbidden Library
Consult the Elder Scribe about ancient ward techniques
